name: mailgun-gemini
description: Gemini CLI extension for Mailgun email, deliverability, suppression, template, Inspect, Optimize, Validate, and reporting workflows.

settings.name: MAILGUN_API_REGION
settings.description: Mailgun API region: us or eu. Defaults to us.

settings.name: MAILGUN_MCP_TAGS
settings.description: Optional comma-separated tool tags to enable: send, validate, optimize, inspect.
